$comment: TEMPLATE ‚Äî not a version record. The juggler-version Worker overlays `latest` plus the `downloads` and `update` blocks (url/sha256/size) from the latest GitHub release; ${version} is filled with the release tag. `downloads` = the human installers the website links; `update` = the swap-installable archive the desktop app's in-app updater downloads. Edit the editorial copy (notice) and per-platform `match` patterns here; never hand-edit version numbers.
